generated_oml:
// ---------- Physical Sensing Components ----------
instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor current sensor (I_M) measuring electric current of the permanent‑magnet synchronous motor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentStream
]

instance MotorEncoderSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder mounted on the motor shaft providing angular position of the motor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderStream
]

instance SecondaryEncoderSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder mounted after the gearbox providing gearbox output angle"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SecondaryEncoderStream
]

// ---------- Data Transmitted ----------
instance MotorCurrentStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance MotorEncoderStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoderSensor
]

instance SecondaryEncoderStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoderSensor
]

instance TorqueVelocityDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TorqueVelocityCalculationModel
]

// ---------- Data ----------
instance MotorCurrentTimeSeries : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Live time‑series of motor current streamed via MQTT"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBroker, MATLABSimulinkEngine
]

instance MotorAngleTimeSeries : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Live time‑series of motor shaft angle streamed via MQTT"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBroker, MATLABSimulinkEngine
]

instance GearboxAngleTimeSeries : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Live time‑series of gearbox output angle (r_out) streamed via MQTT"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SecondaryEncoderStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBroker, MATLABSimulinkEngine
]

instance DerivedTorqueTimeSeries : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Calculated torque time‑series derived from motor current and angle data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TorqueVelocityDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DashboardVisualization, AssetAdministrationShell
]

instance DerivedVelocityTimeSeries : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Calculated angular velocity time‑series derived from angle measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TorqueVelocityDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DashboardVisualization
]

instance DerivedAccelerationTimeSeries : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Calculated angular acceleration time‑series derived from velocity data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TorqueVelocityDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DashboardVisualization
]

// ---------- Enablers ----------
instance MQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker enabling real‑time streaming of sensor data to the digital shadow"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeFrictionIdentificationService,
                 InteractiveVisualizationDashboardService,
                 ModelComparisonService,
                 ControlParameterUpdateService
]

instance MATLABSimulinkEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink execution environment for friction models and data‑calculation models"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeFrictionIdentificationService,
                 ModelComparisonService,
                 ControlParameterUpdateService
]

instance DashboardVisualization : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Custom web dashboard for interactive visualization of measured and simulated data"
    DTDFVocab:enables InteractiveVisualizationDashboardService
]

instance AssetAdministrationShell : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for integrating engineering models with the digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables ControlParameterUpdateService
]

instance SysMLModelingTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML tooling used to create block definition and internal block diagrams of the robot axis"
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelComparisonService
]

// ---------- Services ----------
instance RealTimeFrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real‑time identification of static, kinetic and viscous friction coefficients using white‑box and black‑box models"
    DTDFVocab:provides MotionAccuracyImprovementInsight,
                 UpdateRobotControlParametersAction
]

instance InteractiveVisualizationDashboardService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive dashboard displaying live sensor traces, simulated traces and model comparison"
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelDeviationInsight
]

instance ModelComparisonService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Automated comparison of simulated and measured data to detect model deviations"
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelDeviationInsight,
                 AdjustFrictionModelAction
]

instance ControlParameterUpdateService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that updates robot controller parameters with newly identified friction coefficients"
    DTDFVocab:provides UpdateRobotControlParametersAction
]

// ---------- Insights ----------
instance MotionAccuracyImprovementInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight that updated friction parameters improve motion accuracy of the robot axis"
]

instance ModelDeviationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight highlighting deviations between simulated and measured behavior for engineer analysis"
]

// ---------- Actions ----------
instance UpdateRobotControlParametersAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action that feeds derived friction parameters back to the robot controller"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance AdjustFrictionModelAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action that refines friction model parameters during operation based on new data"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// ---------- Models ----------
instance SysMLStructureModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML block definition and internal block diagrams describing the first rotational axis, motor, gearbox and cycloidal gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelingTool
]

instance FrictionFreeSimulinkModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink simulation model of the axis without friction (reference model)"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEngine
]

instance FrictionAugmentedSimulinkModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink simulation model of the axis including static, kinetic and viscous friction"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEngine
]

instance TorqueVelocityCalculationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Data‑calculation model that derives torque, angular velocity and acceleration from current and angle measurements"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEngine,
                 AssetAdministrationShell
]

// ---------- Digital Twin ----------
instance FrictionShadow : DTDFVocab:DigitalTwin [
    base:desc "Digital shadow representing the first rotational axis of the MABI MAX 100 robot, refined iteratively with live sensor data"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "None – the digital shadow follows the digital‑shadow reference model which defines a one‑way data flow from physical to virtual only."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous, real‑time operation during robot runtime; data are processed as they are received to enable online model identification."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A purpose‑driven digital shadow consisting of a Purpose element (FrictionDerivation), an Asset element (Mabi robot first axis), Processing components (Simulation_M, Simulation_GW, Simulation_GB) that consume input data traces and produce simulated traces, and Metadata linking all elements according to the Digital Shadow Reference Model."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operated stage – the digital shadow is created and used while the robot is in service to monitor and improve its dynamic behavior."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Full traceability of each data point to its generating model and source; continuous identification to account for wear, temperature and load changes; validation by comparing simulated friction‑augmented output with measured output; use of both analytical (white‑box) and data‑driven (black‑box) models to bound uncertainty."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Sensor data are transmitted from the robot to the digital shadow over MQTT; the digital shadow consumes these MQTT messages to populate its data traces."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Use of the Industry 4.0 Asset Administration Shell (AAS) standard and SysML modeling language for engineering models."
]
